hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.py) cd /Users/nicopfammatter/Documents/swaarm/backend 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; echo '[hook] Python formatted & linted' ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) cd /Users/nicopfammatter/Documents/swaarm/frontend 2>/dev/null && npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null; echo '[hook] JS/TS formatted' ;; esac; fi
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git push --force'*|*'git push -f'*|*'rm -rf /'*|*'git reset --hard'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive operation detected'; exit 2 ;; esac
